title: DUNES FAMILY HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: DUNES FAMILY HEALTH CARE DUNES FAMILY HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services through a rural health clinic, including general medical care, family medicine, pediatrics, geriatrics, psychiatry, and community medicine. 620 Ranch Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 271-2163 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 271-2163 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP (Open Card and Trillium), private insurance, and self pay. Sliding scale fees may be available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Coos Bay, Dunes City, Florence, Gardiner, Lakeside, North Bend, Reedsport, Scottsburg, and Winchester Bay SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines General Medical Care Private Clinics Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - SAME DAY CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
